title: Many cheap watchers, one expensive synthesis. Your agent dashboard only re-writes when some session state actually changed.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the observatory wires up · 14 nodes lit once

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: no session changed · every re-tick memo-skips · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · the Clusterer re-checks itself · no input, no cost

beats.name: hero-one-runtime
beats.caption: HERO: one Claude turn · only the Claude lane lights · 3 sibling adapters DARK · the index re-writes ONCE

beats.name: diamond
beats.caption: two sessions move in one drain · the Workstream Index is woken EXACTLY once

beats.name: red-fail
beats.caption: a corrupt Codex dispatch fails RED · no downstream · prior truth stands

beats.name: recover
beats.caption: the next Codex delivery parses · the Codex lane re-lights green

beats.name: batch-spike
beats.caption: a major-new-project delta · distinct workstreams 1 → 3 · the Clusterer wakes ONCE · the single tall spike

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: the laptop goes quiet again · every re-tick memo-skips · flat line bookend
